message:
fix: prevent duplicate tabs by deduping tmux sessions server & client (#79)

Server: POST /api/terminals/attach now returns existing terminal if
one already exists for the requested tmux session, instead of creating
a new duplicate.

Client: attemptReconnect deletes the old terminal from the server when
the reattach produces a new terminal ID, preventing stale duplicates.

Client: tab restore deduplicates by tmux session — keeps latest per
session, deletes extras.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
